---
lang: et
#language: ../common/_language.et.yml
params:
  ReferenceDataFile: NULL
  reportingPeriodFrom: NULL
  reportingPeriodTo: NULL
  birthWeightFrom: NULL
  birthWeightTo: NULL
  gestationWeeksFrom: NULL
  gestationWeeksTo: NULL
  reportingCountries: NULL
  hospitalFilter: NULL
  testUnitFilter: true
  defaultPatientFilter: true
  validationExceptionFile: NULL
---

```{r}
#| label: Make sure the locale is initialised correctly
Sys.setenv(LC_ALL = "et_EE.UTF-8")
```

{{< include _content.qmd >}}
